who: logistics managers in freight brokerage firms processing 5–15 deliveries/week
offer: For logistics managers in freight brokerage firms processing 5–15 deliveries/week, inefficient tracking of delivery fleet mileage causes unaddressed exceptions. We monitor mileage logs and flag exceptions instead of manual mileage tracking and exception reporting.
problem: Inefficient tracking of delivery fleet mileage leading to unaddressed exceptions.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics managers with demo video
Community forums where logistics managers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of mileage logs and exception flagging system on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
